CapybaraGo Stat Calculator

CapyCalc is a free, browser-based CapybaraGo stat planner. Calculate crit rate, final damage, final damage reduction (FDR), ignore crit, combo rate, and counter rate from gems, psionics, mythic treasures, mounts, pets, arcana, inheritance, and equipment. Track your character sheet, plan upgrades, and compare per-type breakdowns for skill, basic attack, dagger, lightning, sword qi, and light spear damage.
